_comment: Curated fixture corpus for the search-quality gate (bead coding_agent_session_search-guided-ops-repro-trust-5u82n.7). Each doc is seeded as one Codex rollout session `rollout-<stem>.jsonl` whose user message contains the listed keywords plus extra_text, dated `age_days` in the past. Keywords are unique single tokens so each single-ref qrel maps deterministically to one session; `sharedtopic` spans two docs for the multi-ref recall case. `staleadvice` is aged past the 365-day stale window so its live trust verdict is `stale`. `privacydoc` carries a fake email to prove the report never echoes body text.

docs.extra_text: rust fn handle_request spawn await mutex lock guard code review
how do I debug the user login flow that keeps failing intermittently
deprecated approach from long ago that has since been superseded
please contact private.user@example.invalid about this and do not leak it
